scripts.build: rimraf dist dist-cjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/make-cjs-entry.cjs
scripts.test: tsx src/contracts/agent-message.contract.spec.ts && tsx src/contracts/task-delegation.contract.spec.ts && tsx src/contracts/approval.contract.spec.ts && tsx src/runtime/base-orchestrator.spec.ts && tsx src/runtime/runtime-context.spec.ts && tsx src/supervision/supervisor-registry.spec.ts && tsx src/orchestration/layered-langgraph/layered-orchestrator.spec.ts && tsx src/orchestration/approval-gate/approval-gate.interceptor.spec.ts
